caption: A person's hand holds a sports trading card featuring a player in a baseball cap, which is signed and numbered "17/20" for "Jim Rice." The card is enclosed in a protective plastic slab. In the background, another man wearing a dark t-shirt sits at a desk with electronic equipment, including a monitor. The setting appears to be a room dedicated to card breaking, with various boxes and supplies visible. On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM." A blue and orange banner with palm tree silhouettes runs across the middle of the screen. As the sequence progresses, the hand subtly tilts the card to catch the light, causing a glare to shift across the surface of the plastic protector, while the man in the background remains seated and looking toward the camera.
